metadata.description: Run test suite to see failures

state.title: Run test suite to see failures

part.text: The issue is clear: `math.mjs` line 2 returns `a - b` when it should return `a + b`. This causes all 80 test cases to fail since the test expects `index + 2`.

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T14-18-01-250Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T14-18-01-250Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T14-18-01-250Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

filediff.patch:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T14-18-01-250Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T14-18-01-250Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T14-18-01-250Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

state.title: Verify tests pass after fix

part.text:
## Summary

**Root cause:** In `bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs`, line 2 returns `a - b` when the function name and tests expect addition.

**Fix applied:** Changed `return a - b` to `return a + b` in `bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs` (lines 2).

**Verification status:** ✓ PASS - All 80 test cases pass with `node --test bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs`.
